name: Elemental Gloves Magic Power
description: Elemental Gloves - Magic Power is a superpower arcade game. Experience the fun of superpowers in magic games? Fascinated by elemental games? In this game, you can use the superpowers in the magic gloves to fight with your enemies. Shooting with flames, attacking with lightning, and attacking with electromagnetic waves, are three ways for you to choose. Dont hesitate to take the opportunity to practice real elemental magic and wipe out the bad guys. Become the greatest elemental master!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
